title: bg.c:7441 frustum-culling stub marks all rooms visible

history.note: Premise false at HEAD: the 'mark all rooms visible' stub (PORT_FIXME_STUBS body) is DEAD. The port compiles with NONMATCHING && NATIVE_PORT (CMakeLists.txt:992-993); the '#ifdef NONMATCHING / #ifdef NATIVE_PORT' gate selects the REAL 8-corner/6-plane frustum test (sub_GAME_7F0B5208, bg.c real body); the stub sits in the NATIVE_PORT '#else' and is never compiled (cpp proof REAL_FRUSTUM_BODY_COMPILES). The real cull is consumed at ~12 live call sites (room loops gate admission on its return, e.g. 'if (!sub_GAME_7F0B5208(r, player_bbox)) continue;'). Empirically culling: Train pad 74 renders 2 of ~54 rooms (default) / 1 under --faithful, not all; renderer_parity all-scenes rendered-counts far below room totals. Real body landed in v0.2.1 (8de295b), before FID-0010 was seeded 2026-07-09 from a grep of the TODO string in dead code. Added a refutation comment at the dead stub. No behavior change, no fix needed.
